Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.game

Class GameManager

java.lang.Object
com.example.battleship.game.GameManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class GameManager extends Object implements Serializable
Manages the state and turn-based flow of a Battleship match.

Controls human and AI players, tracks turns, manages revealed sunken ships, handles firing actions, and restores transient board state upon reloading. Implements Serializable to support saving and restoring match progress.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • GameManager

      public GameManager(String nickname)
      Constructs a new GameManager instance for a player with the given nickname.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The human player's nickname.

  • Method Details

    • getHuman

      public HumanPlayer getHuman()
      Gets the human player instance.
      Returns:
      The HumanPlayer object.

    • getMachine

      public MachinePlayer getMachine()
      Gets the machine (AI) player instance.
      Returns:
      The MachinePlayer object.

    • isHumanTurn

      public boolean isHumanTurn()
      Checks if it is currently the human player's turn.
      Returns:
      true if it is the human player's turn; false otherwise.

    • setHumanTurn

      public void setHumanTurn(boolean t)
      Sets turn ownership.
      Parameters:
      t - true to grant turn to human, false for machine.

    • getNickname

      public String getNickname()
      Gets the player's nickname.
      Returns:
      Player nickname string.

    • setNickname

      public void setNickname(String nickname)
      Updates the player's nickname.
      Parameters:
      nickname - New nickname to set.

    • getRevealedSunkenShips

      public Set<Ship> getRevealedSunkenShips()
      Gets the set of enemy ships that have already been visually revealed as sunk.
      Returns:
      Set containing revealed sunken Ship instances.

    • addRevealedSunkenShip

      public void addRevealedSunkenShip(Ship ship)
      Adds a ship to the set of revealed sunken ships.
      Parameters:
      ship - The Ship to mark as revealed.

    • humanShoot

      public CellState humanShoot(Coordinate c) throws Exception
      Executes a shot targeted by the human player onto the machine's board. Switch turn to machine if the shot results in water.
      Parameters:
      c - Target coordinate for the attack.
      Returns:
      Resulting CellState of the target cell.
      Throws:
      Exception - If coordinate is invalid or cell has already been targeted.

    • machineShoot

      public CellState machineShoot() throws Exception
      Executes an AI-selected shot onto the human player's board. Switches turn back to human if the shot misses (hits water).
      Returns:
      Resulting CellState of the target cell.
      Throws:
      Exception - If selected coordinate is invalid or shot fails.

    • afterLoad

      public void afterLoad()
      Re-initializes transient board bindings and non-serializable fields after loading a saved match.
